dissolveDelay.title: Set Dissolve Delay
dissolveDelay.description: Longer dissolve delays earn higher rewards.

maturity.label: Manage Rewards
maturity.description: Choose how to handle your staking rewards.

state.label: Initial State
state.description: Choose the starting state for your neuron.

processing.description: Hang tight, we're creating and configuring your new Stake!
processing.warning: Please do not close this page or disconnect. This process may take a few seconds.

success.title: Neuron Created!
success.descriptionLocked: Your neuron is locked and earning rewards.

infoBoxes.whatIsStaking: Staking your ICP creates a neuron that earns voting rewards. You can earn up to ~{{maxApy}}% APY depending on your lock period and participation.
infoBoxes.dissolveDelayWarning: The lock period can only be increased, never decreased. The countdown only begins when you start unlocking.
infoBoxes.lockedDescription: Locked: neuron stays locked, earning maximum rewards. Start unlocking later when you want to withdraw.
infoBoxes.unlockingDescription: Unlocking: countdown begins immediately. After the lock period, you can withdraw your ICP.

errors.amountTooLow: Amount must be greater than the transaction fee ({{fee}} ICP)
